batch_theme: AI Infrastructure & LLM Tooling - Tier 1 Targets

vc_targets.location: San Francisco, CA / Menlo Park, CA
vc_targets.investment_thesis: Leading AI infrastructure investor with dedicated focus on DevOps, data stack, middleware, and API platforms. Deep technical expertise from team including former Splunk CTO. Proven track record in infrastructure companies from DevOps to cloud security.
vc_targets.ai_infrastructure_thesis: Actively deploying capital across the AI stack with particular focus on infrastructure layer. Led significant rounds in foundation models and AI tooling. Strong conviction on AI-native DevOps, data infrastructure for LLMs, and developer tools that accelerate AI adoption.

primary_contact.name: Matt Murphy
primary_contact.title: Partner
primary_contact.background: Partner at Menlo Ventures investing multi-stage across AI infrastructure (DevOps, data stack, middleware, API platforms), AI-first SaaS, and robotics. Previously 15+ years at Kleiner Perkins where he co-led the pioneering iFund and backed DocuSign and AppDynamics.

alternative_contact.background: Former CTO at Splunk. Deep technical expertise in cloud infrastructure, data systems, and AI/ML platforms.

primary_contact.name: Martin Casado
primary_contact.title: General Partner
primary_contact.background: General Partner at Andreessen Horowitz leading the firm's infrastructure practice. Previously founded Nicira (acquired by VMware for $1.26B). PhD in Computer Science from Stanford. Central voice in AI infrastructure and policy debates.

alternative_contact.name: Sarah Wang
alternative_contact.title: General Partner
alternative_contact.background: GP on Growth and Infrastructure teams. Deep expertise in infrastructure economics and AI value accrual.

vc_targets.investment_thesis: Founded by Vinod Khosla (co-founder Sun Microsystems). Deep conviction on AI as transformative technology with significant thesis on AI infrastructure, foundation models, and enterprise AI adoption. Willing to take big bets on unconventional ideas.
vc_targets.ai_infrastructure_thesis: Early and major investor in OpenAI. Strong thesis on AI infrastructure as the foundation for the next industrial revolution. Active across foundation models, AI chips, and developer tooling. Vinod Khosla is a vocal advocate for AI infrastructure investment.

primary_contact.name: Vinod Khosla
primary_contact.title: Founder & Managing Director
primary_contact.background: Founder of Khosla Ventures. Previously co-founded Sun Microsystems and was a General Partner at Kleiner Perkins. Renowned technology investor with deep conviction on AI's transformative potential. Author of 'Reinventing Societal Infrastructure.'

vc_targets.location: New York, NY / Menlo Park, CA
vc_targets.investment_thesis: Invests in emerging technologies and contrarian ideas in science and tech. Deep focus on AI, robotics, space, and frontier technologies. Counter-conventional approach to solving vexing puzzles of our time.
vc_targets.ai_infrastructure_thesis: Active investor in AI infrastructure with focus on unconventional approaches. Investments span AI chips, autonomous systems, and AI-native infrastructure. Strong thesis on AI in physical world and edge computing.

primary_contact.title: Partner
primary_contact.background: Partner at Lux Capital focusing on AI, infrastructure, and developer tools. Led investments in Hadrian, Chronosphere, and other AI infrastructure companies. Deep technical background in computer science and engineering.
